title: iris aphylla subsp. polonica
intro: Iris aphylla subsp. polonica, a subspecies of the iris plant, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the iris family (Iridaceae). It has been traditionally used in medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing inflammation and improving digestion, as well as having antioxidant properties. Herbal preparations of Iris aphylla subsp. polonica include infusions and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
